name: Middle Eastren Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water and lentils in a 4-quart Dutch oven over high heat until boiling.
2. Reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and cook until the lentils are almost tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Stir in the potato cubes, dry beef bouillon, salt, and cumin. Cover and cook until the potatoes are almost tender, about 20 minutes.
4. Stir in the zucchini slices. Cover and cook until the zucchini is tender (10-15 minutes).
5. Serve with lemon wedges.
